hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push' || exit 0; git rev-parse HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git rev-parse --verify claude/config >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git rev-parse --verify main >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; config_commits=$(git log main..claude/config --format='%H' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$config_commits" ] && exit 0; found=''; for c in $config_commits; do if git merge-base --is-ancestor "$c" HEAD 2>/dev/null; then found="$c"; break; fi; done; [ -z "$found" ] && exit 0; jq -n '{"decision":"block","reason":"Branch contains commits from claude/config (personal Claude settings). Run: git rebase main to strip them first, then retry the push."}'
